manifest.description.message: Track app usage, context switches, and focus streaks. Get daily/weekly/monthly reports with AI insights.

result.loading.label.description: Label shown while activity report loads

result.loading.description.description: Description shown while activity report loads

result.error.label.description: Label shown when report fetch fails

result.summary.description.message: {switches} switches · {streak}m best streak ({app}) · Enter for AI summary

result.insight.description.message: Press Enter to ask the AI for productivity tips

render.summary.meta.description: Summary meta line in inline render

render.app.sessions.description: App sessions count in inline render

render.site.parent_pct.description: Site percentage of parent in inline render

settings.description.message: Track app usage, context switches, and focus streaks. Type your trigger keyword to see reports.

settings.trigger.description.message: Type this keyword to see focus reports (e.g. "focus today", "focus week").

settings.poll_interval.description.message: How often to check the active window. Lower = more accurate but uses more resources.

settings.auto_start.description.message: Start tracking automatically when the app launches

settings.track_screen_time.description.message: Track time spent in each application

settings.track_switches.description.message: Count how often you switch between apps

settings.validate.poll_interval_range.message: Poll interval must be between 2 and 60 seconds
